How Are the Effectiveness and Dependability of Commercial Motors Assessed?
paragraphs: Industrial electric motors power a wide range of purposes in the global economy. According to the International Energy Agency, the automotive industry is responsible for up to 70% of all energy used in industrial settings, 35% of all energy used in the commercial and service sectors, and 45% of all electricity produced globally (IEA). The […]

The cleanest, most cost-effective, and quickest approach to get dependable electricity is to increase energy efficiency. About 46% of the total electricity used and 69% of the total energy used in the industrial sector are accounted for by motors. One of the biggest issues facing many organizations is energy use.
